# Implementation Task Template

## Task Title

Short title tied to one feature brief.

## Linked Feature Brief

Path to feature brief.

## Linked ADRs

Path(s), or `none`.

## Change Summary

What this task changes in behavior.

## Touched Layers

- `apps/cli`
- `apps/server`
- `apps/web`
- `packages/shared`
- `packages/ui`

## Contract Changes

- added
- changed
- removed

## Acceptance Criteria Covered

- criterion ids from feature brief

## Test Execution Plan

- unit tests
- integration tests
- QA checklist items

## Completion Checklist

- implementation complete
- tests complete
- docs updated
- assumptions captured
- risks documented
